_comment: Marketplace manifest so the repo can be installed with `/plugin marketplace add apeabody007/digits`. `source: ./` means the plugin lives at the repo root (where plugin.json and .mcp.json sit). Keep version in sync with .claude-plugin/plugin.json and SERVER_VERSION in server/digits_server.py.
name: digits

metadata.description: Digits — connect Claude to Apple Numbers

plugins.name: digits
plugins.description: Zero-dependency MCP tools to read and edit live Apple Numbers spreadsheets (cells, formulas, rows, columns, sheets, CSV/PDF/Excel export) via AppleScript, plus budget-review, monthly-report, and data-cleanup skills.
